title: oenothera perennis var. rectipilis
intro: Oenothera perennis var. rectipilis, also known as a perennial evening primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the evening primrose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oenothera perennis var. rectipilis include wound healing, skin protection, and potentially reducing inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
